name: Chicken Cubes with Cherry and Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone the chicken and cut into cubes.
2. Mix sherry, light soy sauce, anise pepper, and chopped scallion together.
3. Pour over chicken and marinate for 30 minutes.
COOKING:
4. Heat oil to 325°F (163°C).
5. Deep fry chicken until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Mix sugar, catsup, vinegar, cornstarch, and lichee juice in a saucepan.
8. Stir until thickened.
9. Add lichee meat, cherries, and pineapple to the sauce.
10. Stir until hot.
11. Serve over chicken.
Chicken Cubes with Cherry, Pineapple and Lichee: Bo Lo Lichee Chicken.
